[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101101101 6
1 001111111 7
2 011101101 6
3 111001000 4
4 101111110 7
5 111111111 a
6 111101111 8
7 001111110 6

70 111010110 6
